headline: Equinix AI Hub Launch Puts Growth And Valuation In New Focus
summary: Equinix has launched its Distributed AI Hub, a vendor neutral AI infrastructure platform. The new offering is designed to help enterprises connect and manage distributed AI ecosystems securely and efficiently across Equinix data centers worldwide. This marks the company’s first comprehensive, globally scalable AI focused platform, broadening its role in enterprise AI infrastructure. For investors looking at NasdaqGS:EQIX, this launch sits alongside an already established position in digital...

headline: Did Equinix’s (EQIX) Distributed AI Hub and CFO Shift Just Reframe Its Platform-Centric Narrative?
summary: Earlier this week, Equinix, Inc. launched its Distributed AI Hub, a vendor-neutral framework that connects and secures distributed AI workloads across its 280 data centers worldwide, and confirmed a CFO transition with Olivier Leonetti succeeding longtime finance chief Keith Taylor from March 16, 2026. The Distributed AI Hub’s emphasis on private, low-latency interconnection and integrated AI security, alongside new leadership with deep infrastructure experience, underscores how Equinix is...

headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Equinix (EQIX) After Its Strong Recent Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Equinix’s current share price lines up with its underlying worth, you are not alone. This article is built to help you weigh what you are really paying for. Equinix shares last closed at US$973.43, with returns of 0.5% over 7 days, 13.5% over 30 days, 27.4% year to date, 16.5% over 1 year, 49.2% over 3 years and 63.5% over 5 years. This gives plenty of data points to test against different valuation methods. Recent attention on data center operators and digital...
